PROV_MSG_TERMINATION_SIGNAL: System termination signal sent to local driver.
PROV_API_KEY_TOOLTIP: Encrypted at rest in the Neural Vault. Never sent to the frontend in plaintext.
PROV_ENDPOINT_TOOLTIP: The base URL for the API. Change this for local nodes (e.g., Ollama) or proxies.
PROV_EXTERNAL_ID_TOOLTIP: A custom ID sent in headers to help track requests on the provider's side.
PROV_PERSISTENCE_TOOLTIP: Stores the API key on the backend engine. REQUIRED for background scheduled jobs to function when the browser is closed.
PROV_PERSISTENCE_DESC: Allow autonomous jobs to use this key without the Neural Vault active.
PROV_PROTOCOL_TOOLTIP: Determines which communication standard (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) the engine uses.
PROV_TEST_TRACE_TOOLTIP: Initiate a neural handshake with the provider to verify API connectivity and protocol integrity.
PROV_HEADERS_TOOLTIP: Additional JSON-formatted headers to include in every request.
PROV_AUDIO_MODEL_TOOLTIP: The specific model used for neural transcription (STT).
PROV_AUDIO_MODEL_HINT: * Select a suggested node from your inventory or enter a custom identifier.
PROV_ADD_NODE_TOOLTIP: Add a new intelligence node (model) to this provider's ecosystem.
PROV_RPM_TOOLTIP: Requests Per Minute: Maximum number of API calls allowed per minute.
PROV_TPM_TOOLTIP: Tokens Per Minute: Maximum throughput allowed per minute.
PROV_COMMIT_NODE_TOOLTIP: Commit and forge new intelligence node.
PROV_SYNC_TOOLTIP: Synchronize provider infrastructure settings with the Neural Vault and update dependent agent nodes.
PROV_HANDSHAKE_BLOCKED: Handshake Blocked: Missing {{param:missing}}. Connectivity testing requires these fields.
PROV_ERR_INVALID_JSON: Invalid JSON format in custom headers

PROV_FORGE_ITEM.TOOLTIP_DELETE: Delete model node from forge inventory.
PROV_FORGE_ITEM.TOOLTIP_RPM: Requests Per Minute: Maximum number of API calls allowed per minute.
PROV_FORGE_ITEM.TOOLTIP_TPM: Tokens Per Minute: Maximum throughput allowed per minute.

SKILL_TOOLTIP_MAIN: Manage Agent Skills, Workflows, and External Tool Integrations
SKILL_TOOLTIP_SKILLS: Executable scripts and tools that agents can invoke to perform actions.
SKILL_TOOLTIP_WORKFLOWS: Guiding protocols and SOPs that agents follow to maintain consistency.
SKILL_TOOLTIP_HOOKS: Automated audits that run during internal swarm communication cycles.
SKILL_TOOLTIP_MCP: External tools connected via Model Context Protocol (MCP).
SKILL_TOOLTIP_NEW_SKILL: Define a new executable skill for the swarm
SKILL_EMPTY_SKILLS_DESC: Create an execution skill to get started
SKILL_TOOLTIP_NEW_WORKFLOW: Create a new guiding protocol for agents to follow
SKILL_EMPTY_WORKFLOWS_DESC: Create a guiding workflow to get started
SKILL_HOOK_AUDIT_DESC: Ensures all tool calls comply with core safety directives before execution. Blocks unauthorized parameter modification.
SKILL_HOOK_MEMORY_DESC: Extracts key insights from tool outputs and commits them to long-term persistent memory ledgers.
SKILL_TOOLTIP_TEST_TOOL: Open Tool Lab for manual execution and testing
SKILL_HINT_EXEC_CMD: Args will be passed as JSON in `TADPOLE_SKILL_ARGS` env var.
MSTORE_DESCRIPTION: Browse and deploy high-performance LLMs directly to your local swarm nodes. All models are vetted for privacy and performance.
MSTORE_HARDWARE_PROFILE_DESC: Tadpole OS automatically calculates VRAM pressure and quantization requirements before initiating a pull. We recommend ensuring at least 2GB of headroom per running model.
TSTORE_SUBTITLE: Discover and install industry-specific agent swarms natively via GitHub MCP.
TSTORE_EMPTY_TITLE: No templates found matching your criteria.
TSTORE_MODAL_FAIL_RESOLVE: Failed to resolve swarm.json. Check network connectivity.
TSTORE_SECURITY_VERIFIED_DESC: This template has been audited for security and compliance.
TSTORE_HOT_LOADING_DESC: Templates are loaded dynamically without stopping the engine.
